Index

Modules: ../common/hex, ../common/system, ../common/types/combat, ../common/types/core, ../common/types/diplomacy, ../common/types/planets, ../common/types/tech, ../common/types/units, config/diplomacy_config, config/espionage_config, config/military_config, config/prestige_config, config/ships_config, config/tech_config, diplomacy/proposals, diplomacy/types, economy/types, espionage/types, fleet, gamestate, intelligence/types, order_types, population/types, prestige, research/types, ship, spacelift, squadron, starmap.

API symbols

`$`:
  • hex: proc `$`(h: Hex): string
  • system: proc `$`(s: System): string
  • fleet: proc `$`(f: Fleet): string
  • ship: proc `$`(s: Ship): string
  • spacelift: proc `$`(ship: SpaceLiftShip): string
  • squadron: proc `$`(ship: EnhancedShip): string
  • squadron: proc `$`(sq: Squadron): string
`==`:
  • hex: proc `==`(a, b: Hex): bool
  • system: proc `==`(a, b: System): bool
add:
  • fleet: proc add(f: var Fleet; squadron: Squadron)
